markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[GrowthX intro call to pitch AI-driven content marketing services to DeepInfra.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Pitch:** GrowthX offers a managed service for SEO/AEO, using proprietary AI workflows to publish 5 articles/week. This model aims to replace hiring a large internal team or managing multiple agencies.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**The Problem:** DeepInfra, with one person for all sales and marketing, needs a scalable content engine to catch competitors like Together AI and Fireworks AI, who drive 4–5x more traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [**The Offer:** A two-phase engagement: a $30k Strategy Sprint (incl. 5–10 articles) to prove value, followed by a $18k/mo Growth Execution phase. The client can opt out after the sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [**The Decision:** Leily Moazami will discuss the proposal with the CEO next week. A 4-week kickoff queue was noted, making a timely decision important for starting soon.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Topics

### DeepInfra's Marketing Challenge

  - [DeepInfra needs comprehensive marketing support, driven by an investor's directive.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Leily Moazami is the sole sales and marketing person, creating a need for a scalable solution.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [**Product:** AI inference cloud for open-source models (e.g., DeepSea, Kimmy), providing the underlying compute.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [**Target Audience:** Technical roles (Heads of Engineering, CTOs, DevOps).](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [**Competitors:** Together AI, Fireworks AI, Nebius, Novita.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [**Current State (SEMrush Analysis):**](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
      - [**Traffic:** 4–5x lower than Together AI and Fireworks AI.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
      - [**Backlinks:** Fewer than competitors, but DeepInfra's traffic per backlink is more efficient than Novita's.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Solution

  - [**Model:** A managed service combining agency strategy with proprietary AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**Scope:** End-to-end SEO/AEO, from strategy to publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [**Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [5 articles/week, published directly to the client's CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [Visibility tracking via a new GrowthX platform (replacing a prior Scrunch partnership).](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
      - [**Strategy Sprint:** A 30–40k phase to create foundational artifacts (personas, topic clusters) and a content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
      - [**Execution:** AI workflows (using OpenAI, Claude, Gemini) draft content, which is then manually reviewed and refined by GrowthX's team before client review.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [**Customization:** Workflows are modular, allowing for custom steps like product integrations or medical claim annotations.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [**Platform Access:** Clients get enterprise access to the visibility platform immediately; the internal content creation platform is shared after the first year.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**Client Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
      - [**Augment Code:** 3–4x organic traffic, cut paid ad spend.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
      - [**Webflow:** Created search-optimized integration pages by ingesting their documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Leily Moazami:** Discuss the proposal with the CEO next week.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**Tyler Pavlas:** Follow up with Leily Moazami next Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
  - [**Tyler Pavlas:** Offer a follow-up call to demonstrate the content creation process for the CEO.](https://fathom.video/share/MJV5yh8dh4AGRFvyPuzKs_Am-csMNYAm?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
